base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: increase net profit or PnL per exposure hour without worsening MAE
expected_effect: Should improve VALID_1DTE_ONLY risk-adjusted contribution by requiring cleaner forward DEX and ES continuation, with flat or better 1DTE average/worst MAE and PnL per exposure hour. Main tradeoff is possible loss of some profitable 1DTE fallback trades; reject if combined 1DTE PnL drops below 98% of the current $1315.3 without a material MAE or exposure-efficiency gain, or if total trades fall more than 10%.
label: 1dte-forward-dex-continuation-box
rationale: Use exactly one legal family: batch_g_missing_0dte_policy_adapted. The leader is plateaued at $7532.8 and 103 trades, while broad veto and upstream changes have either repeated or harmed the objective. The underexplored, legal next move is to refine the 1DTE fallback sleeve without touching VALID_0DTE option-confirmed profiles. breakout_long_1dte is profitable and should not be disabled, but it has 20 trades, $170/hour, average MAE -124.6, and worst MAE -386.75, so a modest continuation-quality box is a cleaner experiment than another call-wall or squeeze duplicate.
strategy_plan_next_experiments: Call-Wall Convex Retention And Heat Containment
